# Sacred Fire Intimacy
> Conscious Sexuality Through Ancient Wisdom

## About
Sacred Fire Intimacy explores conscious sexuality through Advaita Vedanta, classical Tantra, and somatic embodiment.

## Categories
- The Body Temple: Sensation, breath, somatic awareness
- The Connection: Presence, vulnerability, trust
- The Healing: Sexual trauma, shame, grief
- The Energy: Kundalini, tantra, chakras
- The Practice: Daily rituals, breathwork, meditation
